raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kapehz tad juhs spahrdat
prett mannu Appuri / un prett
mannu Ehdamo-Appuri / ko es
Dshwokli pawehlejs? un tu goh-
da tawus Dehlus wairak/ ne ka
manni/ ka juhs barrojatees no ta
labbaka wiffu Ehdamu-Appuru
mannu Israëta Yauschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht fakka tas KUNgs/
tas Israëta Deews: Gann es
biji skaidri fazzijis: TawamNam-
man/ un tawa Tehwa Nammam
bij manna Preekfchaâ staigaht
muhshigt. Bet nu fakka tas
KUNGS: Muhsham es to ne
darrischu/ bet tohs / kas manni
gohda/ gribbu es atkat gohdaht /
nu kas mann nizzina/ tee taps
atkat nizzinati.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redsi/ tahs Deenas nahk/
ka es tawu Elkonn talaustischu /
khdz ar tawa Tehwa Namma El-
kenu/ ta ka ne weens Wezzajs
wairs tawa Namma buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu redseft tahs Beh-
das ta(Deewa)Dshwokfa/wif-
fa Labbuma Weetâ / ko winſch
Israëtam buhtu darrigs / un tur
ne buhs Wezzajs tawa Namma
muhsham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr es tew ne winſis
isdeldefschu no manna Altara/ ka
tawahim Azzim buhs ihgt / un
tawat Dwchtfelei buhs noskum-
tees/ un wiſfa Draudse tawa
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Namma nomirs/ kad tee buh-
par Wihreem tapputchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schi nu buhs ta Sihme-
las pahr taweem divti Dehleem
pahr Ownu un Pineafu nahks
weenâ Deenâ buhs abbein no
mirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es eezelschu tew weeni
peetizzigu Preestert / tas darrih-
pehz mannas Sirde un Dweh-
feles/ tam ustaifischu es weeni
pastahwigii Nammu/ un tas sta-
gahs preekſch manna Swaidit-
muhsham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl atlifs no ta-
wa Namma/ tas nahks un flan-
nifees preekſch winna / par leht-
Randu/ un par Maises Reezen-
un fazzibs: peexenum manni/ lu-
dsang / pee weenas Preeste-
Daltas / ka es weenu Mais-
Rummofu ehst dabbuju.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
